programme.title: Numberblocks
programme.desc: The adventures of friends who can always count on each other.

programme.title: A Little Rusty
programme.desc: The Cloud of Monstrox and Jestro unlocks a mysterious Forbidden Power. What kind ofhavoc will they unleash? And can Merlok 2.0 and the NEXO KNIGHTS make the new COMBO NEXO Powers work? The Knights finally make it to the Lava Lands – using their various new forms of transport, which are all strictly civilian vechicles – and they must regroup and learn to fight together again to face the new threat of Jestro, the Cloud of Monstrox, and their STONE MONSTERS (in this case, Stone Gargoyles.) But Jestro and his monsters beat back the knights and recover the STAFF OF MONSTROX – which was buried under the ceremonial chamber from Episode 210 (and is now the Lava Puker amusement park ride) – and they get away on Jestro's EVIL MOBILE, which he recovers from the HQ garage. Macy says this is exactly why she's been touring the kingdom preparing everyone for the next attack. The Knights have to get it together because now the entire kingdom is under threat…again. Robin decides he must upgrade the Knights' vehicles and make them more “fight optimized.” Ava and Merlok 2.0 must figure out how to use new NEXO Powers because regular NEXO Powers do make Stone monsters back into stone, but the Cloud simply zaps them to life again. Meanwhile, in the IRON MOUNTAINS, Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox find the first of the Forbidden Powers: RELENTLESS RUST. They find the ROGUL STATUE holding the power and zap him to life. Now…they can rust those shiny knights to pieces! Ava and Merlok are attempting to use NEXO COMBO POWERS – with hilarious results – as they try to figure out how they might work. When Jestro attacks, he's able to halt the Fortrex by instantly rusting its tracks and wheels! Robin has his hands full trying to clean all the rust from the attack of Relentless Rust. As the Knights attempt to defend against Jestro, the Cloud is zapping statues to life. He hits a statue with a bolt of lightning as Clay is touching it. Something happens…Clay feels odd stiff as if rock is mixing with his body. Finally, Ava and Merlok 2.0 download to the Knights their new thing: a COMBO NEXO COMBO Power. It works! It can smash the animated statues to dust! They use it to defeat Jestro, but he and the Cloud get away with the Forbidden Power of Relentless Rust. Victory … sort of. Clay talks to Merlok 2.0…something has happened to him. What can they do? Merlok 2.0 is very concerned.

programme.title: The Last Hope
programme.desc: When the Ninjas' attempt to return Garmadon's ‘Helmet of Darkness' to its perch at the Celestial Clock in order to prevent the final battle between Lloyd and his father from beginning fails, a Super Weapon is created that can destroy all of Ninjago. With the Overlord and Garmadon nearing completion of the Super-Weapon, Misako tells the group she thinks there could be one last chance at preventing Lloyd's final battle with his father. She believes if they can steal the helmet off Garmadon's head and return it to it's rightful perch on the Celestial Clock, it could stop the clock before it reaches zero, thus preventing the final battle from beginning. Dressed as Warriors, the Ninja escort their ‘captive' Misako to Garmadon, and the heroes see glimpses of the Super-Weapon being built. In a thrilling escape, Misako cleverly steals Garmadon's helmet, and they race to the Celestial Clock. Lloyd has a brief encounter with his father, and hesitates striking him. When they return the helmet to its rightful perch, they're one second too late, allowing the clock to reach zero, and for it to focus a beam of concentrated light from the sky into the Super-Weapon. Nya is taken hostage, as the others fall off a cliff, barely surviving the fall. The Ninja have failed -- the final battle has begun.

programme.title: Thunderstox
programme.desc: Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox encounters the sculptor. He helps unleash a horde of fierce garden gnomes on Knighton. What will the NEXO KNIGHTS do against this new enemy? Will their new COMBO NEXO Powers do the trick? As Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox head off on the Evil Mobile to 'store' the Forbidden Power in a secret location, they encounter…THE SCULPTOR. His real name is ROBERTO ARNOLDI. He's a sensitive and odd artist who has been laid off by the king (the King ordered a "smashing" statue of the Queen, and the Sculptor made a statue of the Queen literally smashing monsters. He takes everything very literally.) Jestro instructs him to make a "bad" statue that he can use to attack the knights. The Sculptor sets to work. Meanwhile, the NEXO KNIGHTS are discussing the COMBO NEXO Powers, the Forbidden Powers, and what all this means. Lance, meanwhile, decides that since his talk show career is on hold, he thinks he'll install cameras in the Fortrex and do a Big Brother-like expose show on the Knights (he decides NOT to tell the others.) Merlok 2.0 and the Cloud of Monstrox (each talking to their cohorts) explain the history of the Forbidden Powers: it's a history lesson about the WIZARDS' COUNCIL, the Forbidden Powers, and how they were stopped long ago. This visual montage leads Jestro to…MOUNT THUNDERSTROX. The Cloud of Monstrox shows him the circle of ten Standing Stones where he will insert the Forbidden Powers. "What'll happen after that?” asks Jestro, curious. "Oh, I don't want to spoil the surprise," says the Cloud. They insert the first Forbidden Power, Relentless Rust, and it locks into place on its stone. They go off to battle the Knights and collect the "bad" statue the sculptor is making. But he's made a literally bad statue…it's terrible ... garden gnomes. Like an amateur art student. And…it's not even finished. ("You can't rush bad genius!") The Knights attack with their newly modified vehicles and they succeed in destroying the Evil Mobile. They then try to use a COMBO NEXO Power, but can't…it had to be perfect to work (Ava and Merlok need to work on it.) As Jestro and the Cloud retreat, Merlok again talks to Clay about turning to stone! Merlok calls in Robin…he will need him to build something to help Clay as he becomes more and more impaired.

programme.title: Return Of The Overlord
programme.desc: When Garmadon uses his new Super-Weapon to turn Jamakai Village evil, he unwittingly unsettles the balance, allowing the spirit of the Overlord to cross over and possesses his body. Lord Garmadon witnesses the Super-Weapon come to life, revealing it to be ‘Garma-Tron', a giant moving cannon. His first test subject is Nya. Meanwhile, the heroes prepare for the final battle and sneak-attack Garmadon's compound…only to find it empty. The Super-Weapon is moving towards the coastline, where the cannon's range can reach Ninjago. On the way there, the Ninja must face off with Evil Nya, turned dark from the Super-Weapon. On the coastline, Lloyd battles his father atop Garma-Tron. The battle is fierce, but Lloyd fails at stopping his father from firing Garma-Tron, turning Jamanakai Village evil. Garmadon naively celebrates, not realizing he's undone the balance, allowing the spirit of the Overlord to cross over and possess his body. And as the Overlord continues to get more powerful, a hideous metamorphosis is taking place. Lloyd must fight the Overlord, and just when it looks like good will prevail, Lloyd is injured and thrown to the ground. In the end, the villains escape through a portal to Ninjago, and our heroes are abandoned on the island with no way home. And with the Green Ninja injured, it looks like all is lost. Evil has won.

programme.title: Rotten Luck
programme.desc: Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox unleashes the Forbidden Power Ravaging Rot on Knighton! Turning everything into green gooey rot. But Robin has an awesome new invention that could help the NEXO KNIGHTS Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox find a second Forbidden Power near the falling down Swamp Castle: RAVAGING ROT. With this power, they can make everything in the kingdom rot – food, vegetation, anything that grows or is natural. And that's exactly what they do! It's awful and makes everything stink. The Sculptor start to sculpt a portable HeadQuarter for his master, Jestro. Jestro expects it to be done when they return from ravaging the land. Axl is very concerned – he's into organic food ... and now food starts to rot. Merlok 2.0 and Ava are continuing to work on perfecting the COMBO NEXO Powers. We see display screens of MANY of the NEXO Powers. But there's a huge power consumption issue with these new-fangled combos. “I'll have to find an algorithmic power curve consumption solution, magic man,” says Ava. “I always just sort of choose them by, uh, feel.” “What do you feel like?” “Uh, a ham sandwich, a banana, and dragon fire,” responds Merlok. “That produced a combo with 2% efficiency,” says Ava. “This is why we have to actually THINK about and study perfec Combos. We need automatic power integration.” The Knights must stop Jestro from rotting all the food and living plant matter in Knighton and Axl leads the charge. But as they finally confront Jestro, who's trying to rot a field of beans near Fruitbridge, they're hit by his finally completed ROLLING HQ (the Sculptor is proud of the “artsy” elements.) … it's not exactly perfect though … he took the idea of Head Quarter a little too litteral and created a big head. Finally, in this conclusive battle where the knights get strapped on a rotting bridge, Clay emerges in a sleek, new BATTLE SUIT that Robin built for him because he was starting to have trouble moving around (the whole turning to stone thing.) It's smaller and more high-tech than the bigger Mechs of the past. Clay's able to drive Jestro off. Jestro, at the end of the episode, puts the Forbidden Power of Ravaging Rot into Mount Thunderstrox. Meanwhile, back at the Fortrex, Axl makes an organic food feast for all his fellow Knights.

programme.title: Rise Of The Snakes
programme.desc: The four Ninja are snapped out of their post-hero complacency when Lord Garmadon's young son Lloyd shows up and tries to pick up where his father left off. The Ninja dismiss him as a threat, but regret that choice after Lloyd wakes up the evil snake tribe. A prophecy is revealed that states a green ninja will ultimately defeat Lord Garmadon.

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 1
programme.desc: When Jestro the Jester finds the Book of Monsters, chaos breaks loose in the Kingdom of Knighton. Can the newly graduated Knights from the Knights' Academy save the kingdom? It's final graduation fighting exams for the latest Knights from Knights' Academy. All our new Knights demonstrate their prowess: CLAY, AARON, AXL and LANCE. PRINCESS MACY get to join them, but her father doesn't want her to graduate. As part of the entertainment, MERLOK does an amazing magic trick. His act is followed by…JESTRO, the King's Jester. He's terrible (and he should know to never follow a better act.) Everyone laughed because he's a real joke....a total failure. While Jestro roams the halls fo the King's Castle, forlorn, he hears the BOOK OF MONSTERS calling to him from Merlok's library. The book talks Jestro into gathering as many books of spells as he can carry, but they're interrupted by...Clay! As Jestro quickly pages through the Book of Monsters to attack Clay, Merlok arrives. There's a battle in the library between Jestro and Merlok. Finally, the wizard summons up his most powerful spell in self-defence. BOOM! There's a big, magical explosion and when Clay forces his way back into the library, Merlok, Jestro and the magic books are...GONE!

programme.title: New Girl in Town
programme.desc: When the World Petacular comes to Heartlake City and is almost ruined before it's even started, five feisty girls unite, despite their differences, using their creativity to save the day. Best friends Olivia, Andrea, Emma, Mia and Stephanie reside in HeartLake City but didn't know each other - that is until the World Petacular brought them together! On the eve of the biggest event Heartlake City hosts, disaster and chaos is abound. New-in-town Olivia is helping her veterinarian Aunt Sophie with her mobile clinic. But when she's put in charge of training a scruffy puppy named Scarlet, the puppy runs amuck, leaving a trail of destruction as she collides with Andrea, ruins Emma's banner and Stephanie's cakes, and finally spooks Mia's horse Bella who bucks Mia off and sprints away. The girls quickly unite, helping each-other to save the day and most importantly have fun along the way!

programme.title: Home
programme.desc: Back in training mode with the looming threat of Lloyd and the Hypnobrai, Zane wanders after a Falcon and lands himself in a heap of trouble. The rest of the Ninja leave the training dojo to help him and return to find that the snakes have burned it to the ground.

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 2
programme.desc: Realizing they must defend the Kingdom from Jestro's monsters, the Knights try to organize but are despondent when they discover their best advisor – Merlok the Magician – has sacrificed himself to save them. When Jestro awakens, he's been blasted miles and miles away from the King's Castle by Merlok's explosive spell. And, it seems, all the books he was trying to steal have been scattered, too. The Book of Monsters broke Jestro' fall and now he can use the book to attack the people who laughed at him. Meanwhile, the King and his newly-trained Knights pick through the rubble of Merlok's library. They'll have to figure something out, because Jestro and his newly made magic monsters attack King's Castle! Clay organizes the Knights to defend the kingdom, but they've never worked together before. It takes all their training, plus the help of an old friend…MERLOK! Only now he's MERLOK 2.0. Ava has been piecing together what happened and discovering that the “ghost in the machine” she's been chasing is really Merlok in digital form. Now, he can use his magic digitally and he downloads just the right weapons to the struggling Knights! They finally foil Jestro's attack with Merlok's help and officially become NEXO KNIGHTS!

programme.title: Stephanie's Surprise Party
programme.desc: When Emma, Olivia, Andrea and Mia plan a surprise party for Stephanie's birthday, they soon discover that it's not easy keeping their plans secret from Stephanie who becomes suspicious when none of the girls have time to hang out. When Emma, Olivia, Andrea and Mia plan a surprise party for Stephanie's birthday, they discover that it's not easy keeping their plans a secret. As the girls choreograph a dance routine, magic show and search for the perfect present and cake, Stephanie becomes aware that her friends are avoiding her on her birthday and excluding her from their activities... Little does she know that her friends are secretly preparing a surprise pool party for her! Once the surprise is revealed Stephanie realises how much her friends care about her and the importance of friendship.

programme.title: Snakebit
programme.desc: Lloyd, having been kicked out of the Hynobrai snake tribe unlocks a second tribe – The Fangpyres – to help him regain control. The Ninja are busy setting up their new HQ that Zane discovered, but are called to duty when the Fangpyres attack the village where Jay's family lives.

programme.title: The Power Of Merlok
programme.desc: When Jestro attacks a village on the far side of the Kingdom, the NEXO-Knights wonder how they'll get there. Then Macy remembers her dad has a royal RV…maybe they can “mod” that for their own, “knightly” use? Now the NEXO-Knights get rolling…in THE FORTREX, their own ROLLING CASTLE! This great new HQ, which houses Merlok 2.0 as an operating system, will be how the knights move around Knighton and protect it from Jestro and his monsters. Speaking of the evil jester, in this episode Jestro uses some newly-made monsters to attack a town far from the capitol where he thinks he's safe from the Knights' reach. We see two parallel stories here: the Knights training, learning more about digital magic and getting organized as a team and at the same time we see Jestro making monsters, trying to learn how his powers work and talking to the Book. In the end, the Knights roll up in their castle and defeat Jestro and his marauding monsters. Lance thinks he should be the leader because he's a snot. “Of course I'm the leader…I'm a Richmond.”

programme.title: Dolphin Cruise
programme.desc: Olivia, Stephanie, Andrea, Mia and Emma enter a science contest at school and win a trip on a luxury yacht but not everything goes as planned when they set out to sea. When Olivia, Stephanie, Andrea, Mia and Emma enter a school science contest and win a Dolphin sight-seeing trip, not everything goes to plan...As the girls set out to sea on a luxury yacht, misunderstandings and disagreements occur which become secondary when they discover a pod of dolphins in danger. The girls learn that they have to compromise and trust in each other if they are to save the dolphins and their trip out to sea...

programme.title: Never Trust A Snake
programme.desc: After the Fangpyres join forces with the Hypnobrai, Lloyd awakens Pythor – the last remaining snake of the Anacondrai tribe. Pythor lures Lloyd under his spell and steals a map from him that will show him where the remaining two snakes tribes dwell and Uncle Sensei saves Lloyd from doom.

programme.title: The Knights Code
programme.desc: Jestro uses the Book of Chaos to unleash, um, chaos and attack the King's hover train to try and kidnap the royal party. Can the NEXO-Knights bring order out of the chaos and save the King? Jestro finds the Book of Chaos in the countryside and decides he must feed it to the book. The Book of Monsters actually tells Jestro NOT to feed it to him he tells Jestro he's not ready for that kind of power. But Jestro doesn't listen. Now the Book unleashes chaotic monsters and Jestro uses them to attack the King and his party who are on a business-related tour of the kingdom. When the NEXO-Knights show up to stop the monster attacks and realize that they must save King and Queen Halbert – Macy's parents – from the chaotic evil monsters that have been unleashed. Clay asserts himself as leader and brings order to the knights from the chaos. He has his own book: the Book of the Knight's Code. They should all live by it.

programme.title: Country Girls
programme.desc: When the girls go to Mia's grandparents' ranch and Olivia accidentally knocks down the neighbor's barn, the girls promise to raise money to rebuild it and now have to learn to set aside their differences and work together to make good on their promise. Mia invites her friends to her grandparents' ranch for the weekend. But when Olivia accidentally knocks down a neighbor's barn with a tractor, the girls promise to raise the money to rebuild it themselves. Complicating matters, Mia and Stephanie turn out to like the same boy, Martin. They'll have to learn to set aside their differences and work together if they're going to raise enough money to make good on their promise.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Tails gets a megadose of Robotniks growth gas and grows quickly to monstrous proportions, eating everything in sight and accidentally terrorizing the countryside.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik plans to block out the sun and extinguish all life and nature on the planet Mobius. Then he creates a robot son and tries to train him in the ways of wickedness.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Lazy con-man Bo Beagle has the Choas Emerald ring stuck on his finger, and Robotnik wants it for one of his evil schemes.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Wes Weasley lures Tails, Sonic and all of their friends to a yacht under the guise of a "Hero of the Year" ceremony to thank Sonic.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When Sonic rescues a village from a flash flood, he's left with the job of babysitting three baby Groundhogs.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik learns that the most powerful gemstone -- able to create life itself -- is located in Prehistoric Times.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Brandon Quark, an evil half-man, half-duck genius challenges, then teams up with Robotnik to capture Sonic. But Sonic knows their weakness, and pits the Badnik geniuses against one another, and sets himself free.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When Sonic vanishes mysteriously, Tails enlists the help of a bi-plane pilot named William Le' Duc, and Professor Von Schlemmer.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik invents an electron altering generator which makes Scratch and Grounder twice as fast as Sonic. When they lose it and Tails picks it up, Tails speeds through the Mobius countryside leaving disasters and accidents in his wake.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Outraged by a new hit song written about Sonic, Robotnik outlaws music on Mobius then takes pop star, Catty Carlisle captive. With his MD (Music Destroyer) Robot, Robotnik terrorizes the music loving Mobius population till Sonic rescues Catty.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik captures a Kangaroo named MacHopper, and uses his "brain-wipe-reprogramming-computer" to transform him into a resourceful demolitions expert (Ala MacGiver).

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Momma Robotnik forces her son to run for President of Mobius with Wes Weasley as his campaign manager.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: A female space hunter named Katella, who is capturing animals all over Mobius for a Zoo, teams up with Robotnik and captures Sonic. To Robotnik's great fear, she then plans to marry the eggman!

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.sub-title: Blast to the Past Part II
programme.desc: After a disastrous failed mission, Sonic laments that they can't go back and prevent Robotnik's take-over. Dulcy tells them they can and takes Sonic and Sally to the Floating Island where they find the "Time Stones".

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang take Tad under their wing, training him to blast like a pro with Eli's old blaster and teaching him to live by the slugslinger's code. Tad takes to it like a natural, and as Kord says, it looks like they have another "slugslinging savant from the Surface" on their hands. But their training will be put to the test when Tad accompanies them to a showdown with the Scrap Force...and the Shadow Clan!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Tad is still missing after the slug-out with the Shadow Clan, but the Gang have to set off without him when reports start coming in of slugs disappearing all across the 99 caverns. As they pursue the trail of missing slugs, the mystery grows darker when it leads them straight to Dr. Blakk's old stronghold!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Tad's hypnotic slug Pieper has gone megamorph, his gang of supporters all have Gattler blasters, and Tad's control over his army of ghouls is stronger than Dr. Blakk's ever was. The Shane Gang are under non-stop ghoul fire as they struggle to put a stop to Tad's plans and end the mass ghouling of slugs once and for all.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.sub-title: The World Beneath Our Feet Pt 2
programme.desc: Now its Eli's turn to be Slugterra's next Shane - whether he's ready or not! Unfortunately, the slugslinging tournament he enters to prove that he's ready, pretty quickly shows that he's not! So when word of this new Shane reaches the ears of the nefarious Dr. Blakk, he's not too worried... yet.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.sub-title: The World Beneath Our Feet Pt 1
programme.desc: 15-year-old Eli Shane is a regular kid except for one thing: he comes from a long line of Shanes, each who has journied from the surface to protect Slugterra and the slugs that make the world special.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.sub-title: The World Beneath Our Feet Pt 2
programme.desc: Now its Eli's turn to be Slugterra's next Shane - whether he's ready or not! Unfortunately, the slugslinging tournament he enters to prove that he's ready, pretty quickly shows that he's not! So when word of this new Shane reaches the ears of the nefarious Dr. Blakk, he's not too worried... yet.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: When the punks in the Hooligang cruise into Quiet Lawn Cavern, they think no one there's got the guts to stand up to them so they trash the place.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The gang signs up for a weekend camp that promises to teach your slugs tons of new moves - without lifting a finger! Eli thinks it sounds too good to be true... and it is. But exposing the truth draws the ire of the camp's director - and half the campers!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Slug Run is the ultimate, off-road, no-holds-barred, cross-cavern Mecha Beast race. Unfortunately, the only thing lower than the odds of beating the three-time champ who's now racing for Dr. Blakk are the odds of Eli making it to the finish line in one piece!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: When even Kord can't find a way to fix what's wrong with the new upgrades to the Shane Gang's Mecha Beasts, it's time to go to the source: the wondrous Mecha Forge! Hoping to find the cause of the glitch, the gang instead uncovers a huge conspiracy - hatched by Dr. Blakk!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: A short cut takes the Shane Gang through the territory of the Shadow Clan - and try as they might not to, they are discovered and captured by the mysterious creatures. Just when it looks like our heroes are done for, they are helped out of this jam by a most unlikely savior.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Pronto is thrown in jail on trumped-up charges by a corrupt judge, and the only chance to break him out is Eli making a one-in-a-million trick shot. Only one slinger in all of Slugterra can help Eli make a shot like that - Mario Bravado. Finding the formerly-great-but-now-washed-up Mario is easy. Getting him to help is something else entirely.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Long thought to be merely a legend, an Enigmo Slug has finally been spotted. The bidding is high for this rarest of all slugs, and so is the competition to be the first grab it! Eli and the gang actually beat Slugterra's most vicious slug hunter to the prize-only to find that the hunter is now hunting them!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: A fun trip to the mall cavern turns un-deadly when the place is over run by the zombie-like victims of the Zombus slug. With Pronto zombified (not entirely a bad thing, the others kind of like this new, quieter, more monosyllabic Pronto), the rest of the Shane Gang must find the mysterious Mr. Saturday who controls the Zombus slugs-and find a way to stop him.

programme.title: Ryan's World
programme.desc: Discover how fun learning can be with YouTube superstar, Ryan, and all of his Ryan's World friends!

programme.title: Jason Vlogs
programme.desc: Jason and Alex wash their hands for supper, then dig in to some delicious lessons about healthy eating habits!

programme.title: Ryan's World
programme.desc: Ryan gets his hands gooey with DIY slime, takes on extreme challenges, and throws a family game night!

programme.title: Jason Vlogs
programme.desc: Jason and Alex hit the road! The brothers visit a kids museum, the zoo, get their eyesight checked and more.

programme.title: Ryan's World
programme.desc: Ryan, his family and his friends stay put to beat each other in a variety of nail-biting 24 Hour Challenges!

programme.title: Ryan's World
programme.desc: Kid video superstar Ryan and his Ryan's World pals take you along on all their awesome learning adventures!

programme.title: Jason Vlogs
programme.desc: Jason and Alex are at it again! Watch their birthday pranks and slimy shoes, plus fun games and surprise eggs.

programme.title: KidCity | KidCity Vs. Aliens!
programme.desc: Play along with the KidCity family —Little Flash, Ava, DadCity, and MomCity— in all their kid-friendly games!

programme.title: Onyx Family Ultimate mishmash Vol 8
programme.desc: Onyx Family is best known for their spooky skits, starring the Onyx Kids: Shiloh, Shasha, Sinead, and Shalom.

programme.title: Challenge Squad | Human Bowling!
programme.desc: Challenge Squad takes on the most epic challenges, featuring your favorite YouTube stars!

programme.title: EvanTubeHD | A Snacking Expedition!
programme.desc: Share in the fun with YouTube star EvanTubeHD, his sister JillianTubeHD, and the whole Tube Family!

programme.title: HobbyKidsTV | 48 Hours of Fun!

programme.desc: Share in the fun with YouTube star EvanTubeHD, his sister JillianTubeHD, and the whole Tube Family!

programme.desc: Come along for the fun with popular YouTube family, HobbyKidsTV! Plus, HobbyKids Adventures!

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city's sewers transform into Indiana Jones' white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you've entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Pincode
programme.desc: Grown up Kikoriki characters rock the world with their scientific superpowers and tell the kids scientific facts in a most entertaining way. The crew follows Captain Pin as they learn about the world we live in and share this knowledge with us.

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn't! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can't help being sucked in by Moose's relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Back to Back
programme.desc: Embark on an electrifying journey as they boldly leap from one heart-pounding expedition to the next, fueled by their unbreakable bond and insatiable thirst for excitement. Get ready to be swept away in a whirlwind of adrenaline-pumping quests, where danger and discovery await them at every turn.

programme.title: Future Card Buddyfight
programme.desc: It is the year 2030, and the stage is the capital of Japan, Chou-Tokyo. Through "Buddyfight", humans have started cultural interactions with residents from other worlds called "Affinity Dimensions". Buddyfight is a game with selected humans as the "Buddyfighter", and residents from the other world as the partner (known as "Buddy Monster"). These battles have high significance and sometimes it is even used to decide the fate of a nation, and naturally there are those who seek to use the Buddy Monsters for evil purposes.

programme.title: I'll Get You! Holiday
programme.desc: The action takes place in all year round resort, where Wolf doesn't chase Hare to eat him anymore: now it's all about sports and competition. However, in his crazy chase after recognition and victories the grey hooligan often uses methods that aren't really fair, which provokes awkward and funny situations.

programme.title: Bat Pat
programme.desc: The series follows the comedy adventures of Bat Pat and the Silver brothers Martin, Leo and Rebecca as they unravel mysteries and cross paths with supernatural creatures of the night that lurk, haunt, shriek and dig themselves up in every dark corner of their home in Fogville, a small town that seems to be the center of all things weird in the world, a veritable magnet to ghosts, mummies, witches, creatures, werewolves and things that go bump in the night. Bat Pat will prove that the supernatural isn't always evil but just misunderstood. Our heroes will come to understand something important: the supernatural “bad guys” are not really bad, but normal people whose actions are misunderstood by the more inhabitants of Fogville and what they really want is... just help!

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green's new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he's the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: TOBOT
programme.desc: Ryan and Kory are twin brothers with one big secret: They're Tobot pilots.

programme.title: Roger
programme.desc: The lively adventures of a little girl, the carefree, joyful and occasionally perky Fatou, and an alien, the clumsy Roger, on a tropical island… Throughout their adventures, they trigger small accidents that sometimes grow into major disasters, but (almost) always end on a happy note. In short, Roger and Fatou spend their time saving the island from their own mistakes and blunders.

programme.title: VIP Pets
programme.desc: ¡Somos las VIP Pets! ¡Las perritas más guays con pasión por los peinados! Únete a nosotras para vivir miles de aventuras juntas con emocionantes cambios de look: ¡nuevo pelazo, qué estilazo!

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: It's countryside chaos as Shaun The Sheep returns to the small screen with his very own series. Peace in the valley turns to mayhem in the meadow as Shaun leads his flock into all sorts of scrapes and scraps, running rings around sheepdog Bitzer when the Farmer's back is turned.

programme.title: LEGO Set Builds Ninjago: Mountain Shrine / Kai's Ninja Ambush / Jay & Skull Motorbike / Ice Dragon / Spinjitzu Dojo / Garmadon's Dark Fortress
programme.desc: Enjoy this speed build of Lego Ninjago 2254 Mountain Shrine! / Enjoy this speed build of Lego Ninjago 2258 Kai's Ninja Ambush! / Enjoy this speed build of Lego Ninjago 2259 Jay & Skull Motorbike! / Enjoy this speed build of Lego Ninjago 2260 Ice Dragon! / Enjoy this speed build of Lego Ninjago 2504 Spinjitzu Dojo! / Enjoy this speed build of Lego Ninjago 2505 Garmadon's Dark Fortress!

programme.title: T-Rex Ranch
programme.desc: Park ranger Darren spills coffee on his computer and all the park cameras go down, meanwhile, a sneaky intruder gets into the park by using cookies as a distraction!

programme.title: T-Rex Ranch
programme.desc: There is a new addition to the T-Rex Ranch park ranger team, meet Cam! On his first mission, he goes on an adventure with Zoe to find the Peteinosaurus dinosaur!

programme.title: LEGO® DREAMZzz: Trials of The Dream Chasers: The Dream Forge
programme.desc: As the clock runs out to face the Dream Forge, Mateo and his friends enlist the help of the mysterious Dream Bandit and her abilities to manipulate time. Mr. Oz and Albert defend the forge from a grimspawn onslaught while the Dream Chaser hopefuls enter the forge and face their deepest fears. But they must hurry: if the forge is destroyed before they finish, they may never become Dream Chasers!

programme.title: Bratz: North Pole
programme.desc: The Bratz Babyz are back and cuter than ever in this delectably sweet Christmas adventure about the power of friendship and positive attitude! When a trip to the mall with Gran leads to a shocking discovery that Santa won't be able to "deliver" this Christmas, the Bratz Babyz take matters into their own hands and work together to save Christmas!

programme.title: Science Max: Water Car
programme.desc: Water power! A home-made water-powered car gets maxed out to a 500-litre version.

programme.title: Elemon: Elemon Forever
programme.desc: With the great battle over, Mateo realizes he must set out on a journey to continue to grow as an Elemon creator. This gets Leo thinking. Perhaps there's more for him to learn about the secrets of Elemon in the wild world beyond New Olympia Polis walls.

programme.title: Sadie Sparks: Advanced Pranking
programme.desc: Sadie and Gilbert are practising boring locking spells when Blaine arrives, boasting that Cornelius is going to allow him access to an ancient book of advanced magic.

programme.title: Kidibli: Living in a fortified Castle!
programme.desc: Today Kidi takes you to the fortified castle of Guédelon to find out how the kings and queens of the Middle Ages lived! He will paint and talk to the castle workers. Let's go back in time!

programme.title: Tasty Tales of the Food Truckers
programme.desc: When the gang accept the invitation to attend the annual Clambake Festival, they did not know they have to bring their own clams.

programme.title: Tasty Tales of the Food Truckers
programme.desc: Sonny is summoned to cook for some mysterious enchanters. However, he has to use “magic” to prove that he is worthy of getting his name written in the history book of magic cooking.

programme.title: Zak Jinks: The Hidden Truth / Lights, Camera, Action!
programme.desc: After reading a magazine, Zak is terrified that aliens are living disguised among the human population. / Zak accidentally breaks his sister's "Teeny Weeny Bunny" DVD. Zak has a great idea to re-record

programme.title: Gaby Time: Catching The Bus with Miss Gaby / Making Friends with Miss Gaby / Learn Crosswalk Safety with Miss Gaby / Missing Your Pet with Ms. Gaby
programme.desc: Join Miss Gaby in her interactive play-along adventures. Play along while learning about things like going to school and catching the school bus from a real teacher, Miss Gaby! programme.title: Danny Go! Dance Songs: Pigs on the Loose! Farm Animal Adventure / Ka-Pow! Superhero Dance / “In the Mood for Food!” Cooking Dance
programme.desc: Are you ready for an unforgettable FARM ANIMAL adventure?? If they get loose, you gotta get off the floor fast! / Are you ready to be a SUPERHERO? Dance along with Danny and his friends as they pretend they have amazing powers like super strength, invisibility, laser eyes and more! Oh, but when your powers run out, you better follow the dance moves to charge back up! / Are you feeling HUNGRY?? Time to do some cooking in the kitchen! Dance along with Danny Go and his friends as they mash potatoes, chop carrots, crack eggs, mix cake batter and more!

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Matt Knudsen was born in Hawaii, raised in the Mid-west and sailed around the world as a merchant marine. As an actor, Matt shared the big screen with Oscar winner Sean Penn in Gangster Squad, or you may also recognize him from his appearances in shows like Crazy Ex-Girlfriend, Key & Peele, Workaholics, The League, Big Love, Boston Legal or Malcolm in the Middle just to name a few. Matt has also been a part of several high profile commercial campaigns for companies including: Apple, IBM, GE, Volkswagen, DirecTV, Pepsi and more which have aired during the Superbowl and The Olympics. As a comedian, he's appeared on Conan, The Late Late Show, Last Call, ASX Live and Comics Unleashed, as well as dozens of festivals, including: Montreal Just for Laughs (Best of the Fest), The San Francisco Sketchfest, Bridgetown, High Plains, Limestone and has even entertained at The White House for President and Mrs. Obama.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: JJ Barrows was raised in South Carolina as the middle child of a preacher's family. Having always felt a little different, JJ uses humor to navigate through the realities of life.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: After forty years performing a blend of stand-up, story, and shtick, Bob Stromberg brings his style to the trials of aging.

programme.title: Marc Yaffee
programme.desc: Adopted at birth and confused ever since, Marc takes his audiences on a comedy joyride as he explores his multi-ethnic roots and the culture clashes that fill his world. Marc's smart but relatable comedy demonstrates a universal appeal that has landed him appearances on PBS, Comics Unleashed, The Latino Laugh Festival and the Showtime special, Goin' Native. Funny not filthy, Marc serves audiences his original comedy recipe, specially prepared for non- stop laughs. Tasty topics, spicy premises and savory punchlines, are all dished out with a dash of sarcasm and a grain of salt. A regular in Las Vegas, Marc has performed six times overseas for Armed Forces Entertainment and he's a past winner of Ventura Comedy Festival's Funniest Person Contest.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.sub-title: My Life As I Know It Now
programme.desc: With an act that crosses all boundaries, B.T. will surely have you rolling with laughter. His physical performance style and charm landed him two performances on NBC's Friday Night Videos and a performance at the prestigious HBO U.S. Comedy Arts Festival. B.T. has also appeared on BET's Comic View, MTV's The Jenny McCarthy Show, and FOX's The Keenan Ivory Wayans Show.

programme.title: Don Barnhart
programme.desc: Don's ability to keep audiences of all ages howling with laughter and coming back for more is what separates him from the average joke teller.

programme.title: David Dyer
programme.desc: David Dyer has been performing at stand-up at comedy clubs and corporate events for over twenty years. He's worked with some of the best comics in the industry including Mike Birbiglia, Jim Breuer, and Lewis Black. He's been a contributing writer to NBC's Late Night with Jimmy Fallon and ABC's Politically Incorrect. He's a regular on the nationally syndicated Bob and Tom Show and often appears on the roster for their “Friends of The Bob and Tom Show” comedy tour. He's the host of a new web series called Sidecar Sessions where he interviews guests who are sitting in the sidecar of his motorcycle as David pilots the bike around town. David also created and stars in another web series called Pillars with co-star, Kevin Yon. David became an on-call firefighter with Grand Rapids Township in Michigan….his wife is nervous.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Greg Warren is a nationally touring headliner and has been featured on Late Night with Seth Meyers, Last Comic Standing, Comedy Central Presents, The Late Late Show with Craig Ferguson, BET and CMT. programme.title: RiffTrax

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of MST3K bring their comedic riffing treatment to the short Library World! Join Mike, Kevin and Bill as they step into Library World!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The protagonist rides around the Sunset Strip on a motorcycle, and he's trying to help a friend keep his sleazy nightclub open in the face of organized crime. programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to this short all about the joys of friendship. Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Friends!

programme.title: SHATTERED (2007)
programme.desc: Crime thriller starring Pierce Brosnan and Gerard Butler. A successful businessman and his wife set off on a car journey, only to have it commandeered by an armed stranger who sends them on a series of tasks.

programme.title: Eye of the Beholder
programme.desc: A private eye shadows a female serial killer of men all over the U.S. without her knowing as he, strangely enough, occasionally acts as her guardian angel.

programme.title: Kill Switch
programme.desc: A troubled detective travels to Memphis in order to track down a pair of serial killers.

programme.title: Clue
programme.desc: Here is the murderously funny movie based on the world-famous Clue board game. Was it Colonel Mustard in the study with a gun, Miss Scarlet in the billiard room with the rope, or was it Wadsworth the butler. Meet all the notorious suspects and discover all their foul play things. You'll love their dastardly doings as the bodies and the laughs pile up before your eyes.

programme.title: Streets of Blood

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II
programme.desc: The heat's back on! And Eddie Murphy is cool as ever in this sizzling, smash-hit sequel to Beverly Hills Cop. Axel Foley (Murphy) is back-back where he doesn't belong! He's going "deep, deep, deep undercover" into the chic wilds of Southern California, unleashing his arsenal of blazing gunfire and rapid-fire gags against a gang of international munitions smugglers. Back, too, are Judge Reinhold and John Ashton as Murphy's crime-busting sidekicks. And Top Gun's director Tony Scott keeps the pace fast, furious and funny.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: The non-human machine ruling elite of the nuclear war-torn future has dispatched a cyborg assassin into the past to kill a young boy because he soon will be the resistance leader against the machines.

programme.desc: George wants to marry Jane, but she swore off marriage after her first husband broke her heart. After wishing he had met Jane before she got married, George winds up ten years in the past.

programme.desc: When a world-renowned author can't find inspiration for her next fantasy book, her over-bearing mother takes her to a farmland retreat to get her creative juices flowing.

programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. A bridal shop owner clashes with the a competing business's owner.

programme.desc: A couple purchases a home, and after they move in, strange things begin to happen.

programme.title: The Condemned 2

programme.title: War
programme.desc: An FBI Agent seeks vengeance on a mysterious assassin known as "Rogue" who murdered his partner.

programme.title: The Boxtrolls

programme.title: ParaNorman

programme.title: Eagle Eye
programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf and Michelle Monaghan star as two strangers trying to escape danger when they are ripped from their ordinary lives and 'activated' as part of a hightech assassination plot.

programme.title: Death On the Nile
programme.desc: Hercule Poirot attempts to solve the murder of a wealthy heiress while taking a cruise on the Nile River.

programme.title: Murder on the Orient Express
programme.desc: Famous detective Hercule Poirot is on the Orient Express, but the train is caught in the snow

programme.title: 13 Hours: The Secret Soldiers of Benghazi
programme.desc: The gripping true story of six elite ex-military operators assigned to protect the CIA

programme.title: Sands of Iwo Jima
programme.desc: Tough-as-nails career Marine Sergeant John Stryker is greatly disliked by the men of his squad.

programme.title: In The Line Of Fire
programme.desc: A Secret Service agent is taunted by calls from a would-be killer who has detailed information about the agent - including the fact that he failed to save President John F. Kennedy from assassination. When the current president is threatened, the agent is determined not to let history repeat itself.

programme.title: Air Force One
programme.desc: Harrison Ford and Gary Oldman star in Wolfgang Petersen's thriller about the hijacking of Air Force One with the First Family on board.

programme.title: First Daughter
programme.desc: A female Secret Service agent (Hemingway) goes against protocol to save the U.S. president from an assassination attempt.

programme.title: First Target
programme.desc: The Secret Service attempts to prevent an elaborately plotted assassination attempt on the President.

programme.title: Her Husband's Affairs
programme.desc: Trouble abounds when an advertising executive and his meddling, madcap wife team up to promote a crackpot inventor's new embalming fluid.

programme.title: Let's Do It Again
programme.desc: A couple faces divorce after a wife's plan to teach her unfaithful husband a lesson backfires.

programme.title: The Lone Wolf Keeps A Date
programme.desc: The Lone Wolf, William, is in Havana and helps Robinson retrieve $10,000 that was stolen from her. The money is for her boy friend's release from prison for a crime he didn't commit. William locates the gang of crooks and plays both sides of the law in order to return the money to Robinson.

programme.title: The Taming Of The Shrew
programme.desc: A rambunctious version of Shakespeare's comedy about a rich merchant who has two daughters, one sweet, comely and shy and the other gorgeous but mean-tempered. The sweet-tempered daughter is being courted by several young men who are stunned when her father announces that she cannot marry until her sister does.

programme.title: War and Peace
programme.desc: The personal stories of many characters, love affairs and philosophies are woven throughout this massive and intricate tapestry of Russia during Napoleon's invasion at the turn of the 19th century.

programme.title: Father Goose
programme.desc: Cary Grant stars in one of his funniest roles as a boozy beachcomber sitting out WWII in peace - until the Allies recruit him to be a lookout on the South Pacific isle.

programme.title: Operation Petticoat
programme.desc: A submarine captain and his supply officer are determined to get their dry-dock sub back into WWII action. However, a bevy of nurses comes aboard, causing hijinks in the hot pink sub.

channel.display-name: Movies on the Rotten Tomatoes Channel

programme.title: The Cocoanuts
programme.desc: A group of zanies takes over a resort hotel in the days of the Florida land boom.

programme.title: Monkey Business
programme.desc: Four stowaways get mixed up with gangsters and crewmen as they race from staterooms aboard an ocean liner.

programme.title: The Paleface
programme.desc: A dentist is duped into marrying sharpshooter Calamity Jane.

programme.title: Holiday Inn
programme.desc: This musical follows a man who leaves showbiz to run an inn, and his former partner and rival in love.

programme.title: Coogan's Bluff
programme.desc: An Arizona cop is sent to New York City to extradite a captured murderer, but when the killer escapes, the hunt is on!

programme.title: Miami
programme.desc: Angela (29) blows into a small town in the Finnish countryside, dazzling the locals with her exotic dancer troupe, sequined swirls and mega-watt smile. After a nasty encounter backstage she leaves town just as fast, only now with her estranged half-sister Anna (21) in tow. Anna gladly exchanges a dreary life in a bakery for an adrenaline-fueled existence on stage. Happy to be closer to her glamorous older sister, she embraces the world of exotic dancing. But none of the champagne bubbles, sparkly make-up and happy house beats can protect her as she tries blackmail to save Angela from the trouble that keeps following her. Dark forces from the underworld test their newly found sisterhood.

programme.title: The Mimic
programme.desc: A screenwriter (Thomas Sadoski) explores the lighter side of a sociopath when he befriends a new neighbor (Jake Robinson) on the local newspaper. After unsettling rendezvous, he sets out to learn his true intentions.

programme.title: The Sand Dune
programme.desc: A restaurant on the coast of Texas, is a place where fate intervenes in lives of two young people, Aylin and Jake. In a heartbreaking series of events, two soul mates are forced apart. Many years later yet another chance encounter.

programme.title: Go Back to China
programme.desc: When spoiled rich girl Sasha Li blows through half of her trust fund, she is cut off by her father and forced to go back to China and work for the family toy business.

programme.title: Best Friend From Heaven
programme.desc: When her dog is killed, Tara cancels her wedding. But her dog's ghost and her small town have a surprise.

programme.title: A Match for the Prince
programme.desc: MyTime Movie Network

programme.title: Final Girl
programme.desc: A violent game of cat and mouse between a group of sadistic killers and a young woman trained in the ways of death.

programme.title: May the Best Wedding Win
programme.desc: Tiffany and her frenemy compete over wedding bookings, despite her not having a real fiancé.

programme.title: The Wedding in the Hamptons
programme.desc: A designer debuts at a Hamptons wedding and is mistaken for a socialite and falls for a groomsman.

programme.title: Ruby's Bucket Of Blood
programme.desc: Passion runs as ripe as the sweltering bayou summer when a forbidden relationship becomes an inevitable catalyst that changes the lives of everyone it touches in a Louisiana club.

programme.title: Evil
programme.desc: Swedish filmmaker Mikael Hafstrom directs the coming-of-age drama Ondskan (Evil), based on the autobiographical novel by Jan Guillou.

programme.title: Sioux City
programme.desc: Focuses on Jesse Rainfeather Goldman, a young doctor of Native American ancestry raised by an affluent Beverly Hills family.

programme.title: Captive
programme.desc: In order to escape hectic city life, a young couple moves to Oregon where they buy and operate a small hotel. Their world is shattered when two criminals kidnap and terrorize them. Based on a true story.

programme.title: Untold Scandal
programme.desc: The objects of each other's first love in secret, Lady Cho and Jo-won become co-conspirators in a dangerous game of love and intrigue.

programme.title: Where the Truth Lies
programme.desc: On the night of April 1997, a college student was murdered in a burger shop washroom for no apparent reason.

programme.title: The Vanished
programme.desc: The body of Jin-han's wife whom Jin-han secretly murdered suddenly disappears. The mystery and the suspense surrounding the disappearance grows bigger and bigger.

programme.title: Another Child
programme.desc: Joo-ri finds out her dad's affair with Yoon-ah's mom. Teen girls try to stop it, but make things worse.

programme.title: Weapons of Warfare
programme.desc: When 19 year old TJ, decides to leave the nest of his parents who are preachers of the gospel and turns to the streets for the love and support he always wanted. His life is turned upside down almost over night with gun violence, drug dealings, stolen money and countless crimes in the blink of an eye. His life becomes a tug of war between the parents that raised him and his new gang leader chief Who's bringing him further down to the ground.

programme.title: Double Kill
programme.desc: A serial killer known as DGK (The Doppelgänger Killer) makes a fatal mistake when he kidnaps the wife of one of the most decorated FBI Agents in U.S. history. DGK kidnaps a victim, and holds them hostage until he can find their doppelg√§nger. Once found, he kills both of his captives, paints their bodies, and sits them in a place where they can easily be found together, only to have their crime photos taken and showcased to the world as a work of art.

programme.title: Envision
programme.desc: Thomas had the perfect life until he lost his wife and son. After a ground-breaking surgery he is given an implant that allows him to create his own virtual reality. When the implant malfunctions, Thomas discovers a dark, long-forgotten secret.

programme.title: Let Go & Let God
programme.desc: Let Go and Let God follows two people from vastly different worlds whose lives are rocked after experiencing sudden deaths in their family. They question God as a result, but find the faith they're looking for on an unexpected path.

programme.title: Closer to God
programme.desc: This modern day Job like tale of an up and coming Christian lawyer who has come a long way from the streets of his childhood. He and his family are faced with several tests to their faith including betrayal, success, death and greed.

programme.title: Ninja
programme.desc: While studying Ninjutsu in Japan, Casey is asked by his Sensei to return to New York to protect the legendary Yoroi Bitsu, an armored chest that contains the weapons of the last Koga Ninja.

programme.title: Red Lights
programme.desc: A psychologist (Sigourney Weaver) and her assistant (Cillian Murphy) investigate a renowned psychic (Robert De Niro) who has resurfaced years after his critic mysteriously passed away.

programme.title: My Baby Gone
programme.desc: Pregnant Emily bonds quickly with her pregnant neighbor Kelly, but Kelly is faking it and plans to steal Emily's baby.

programme.title: Stolen
programme.desc: A former thief frantically searches for his missing daughter, who has been kidnapped and locked in the trunk of a taxi. Starring Nicolas Cage and Malin Akerman.

programme.title: Eye See You
programme.desc: Recovering from the psychological effects of witnessing a brutal crime, FBI Agent Jake Malloy (Sylvester Stallone) checks into a rehabilitation clinic for law enforcement officers in the remote wilderness of Wyoming during the dead of winter. He soon finds himself helping other patients as a serial killer begins killing them one by one.

programme.desc: Juana termina con Héctor por ocultarle que Vanessa regresó. Luisa organiza una cena romántica para Fernando. Rubén tiene miedo de que Mayra descubra que le robó porque se llevó todos los documentos de sus empresas a su casa.

programme.title: Teresa

programme.title: 40 y 20

programme.title: Vecinos

programme.title: Vecinos

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Llegó el día del torneo y los chicos de la Elite Way School están preparados para poder ganarlo. Alicia y Alma encierran a Walter en venganza por robar las estrategias del equipo Elite. Gustavo le pide a José que convenza a Teo.

programme.title: Rebelde

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Vico platica con Rocco del maltrato que sufre por su papá. Diego tiene que soportar al hijo de la novia de León, que parece ser perfecto, Javier. Max le confiesa a Sol que le gusta Celina y ella le dice que no le gustan los hombres. Javier besa a Roberta.

programme.title: Simplemente María

programme.title: Simplemente María

programme.title: Simplemente María
programme.desc: Karina amenaza a Vanessa con decirle a Alejandro que atropelló a María para que la ayude a regresar con él. Georgina cambia su testamento para favorecer a Alejandro.

programme.title: Simplemente María

programme.desc: Un hombre se retira de la lucha libre y muestra a su hijo fotografías que tienen una rosa por cada pelea ganada.

programme.title: Santo y Blue Demon en la Atlántida
programme.desc: Un científico nazi, usando la ciudad perdida de Atlantis como su base de operaciones, amenaza con destruir la civilización con una bomba nuclear. El científico nazi quiere que el Tercer Reich empiece a gobernar de nuevo y si sus demandas no se cumplen, él seguirá adelante con su amenaza de aniquilación nuclear. Con muy poco tiempo que perder, Santo es enlistado para encontrar la bomba nuclear, desarmarla y poner fin al plan diabólico del científico nazi.

programme.title: Ahí está el detalle
programme.desc: Cantinflas es un hombre perezoso e irresponsable que sale con una sirvienta que trabaja en la casa del señor Calletano. Dolores, la esposa del patrón, confunde a Cantinflas con un amante, y él se aprovecha de la situación para quedarse a vivir en la casa.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Doncellez y preñez no pueden ser a la vez

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Quien por malos caminos anda, malos abrojos halla
programme.desc: Una joven y su padre sufren un asalto y al intentar proteger a su hija él le dispara al ladrón. Los hijos del ladrón deciden vengarse del asesino de su padre, pero el hermano menor no está de acuerdo a lo que se dedica su familia.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Una mujer sufre un asalto y su pareja le aconseja que vaya a poner una denuncia, pero ella teme hacerlo. La policía logra atrapar al ladrón que asaltó a la mujer, pero por falta de pruebas queda libre.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Una caída más es una caída menos
programme.desc: Xitlali vive con su papá. En la escuela, algunos de sus compañeros le quieren enseñar a tomar y fumar, pero una maestra se da cuenta y la manda a que asista a clases de box. Sin embargo, a su padre no le parece bien que aprenda ese deporte.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Al peligro con tiento y al remedio con tiempo

programme.sub-title: Juventud sin salud, más amarga que la senectud

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Un programa de reconocida trayectoria, en el que se presentan especiales de reportajes de investigaciones periodísticas de temas de actualidad, de vanguardia, de opinión pública y de problemáticas sociales, este además tiene su faceta ligera y algunas veces incluye episodios con entrevistas exclusivas de los famosos y personajes que están haciendo noticia. El show despliega un panorama actual de los hechos más importantes del mundo y especialmente de las comunidades iberoamericanas, realizado por un grupo de periodistas reconocidos e importantes, cuyos trabajos profesionales han sido amplios, ellos tienen años de experiencia en el área del periodismo y son muy profesionales a la hora de presentar sus reportajes, teniendo en cuenta siempre la responsabilidad que tienen ante el público.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom sets off in Alaska to check out vintage first-generation Bronco owner Adam McNabb, to discover his collection of various Broncos and assorted off-road delights.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom visits a remarkable motorcycle collection in Staten Island, NY, filled with Harley-Davidson, Indian, and Vincent motorcycles. The collection is so extensive that it overflows from the garage and basement and even finds its way into the living room and dining room of the house. The motorcycles span from 1910 all the way to 1980. We hope you enjoy this once-in-a-lifetime collection.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Ray Evernham shows Tom his incredible collection of his vintage IROC, Stock Cars, and Modified Cars from the early days of racing. He also has a few surprises up his sleeve which leave Tom speechless.

programme.title: The Appraiser
programme.desc: Colin has the pleasure of looking over a rust-free 1966 Dodge Charger from the Arizona desert with all the right factory options.Next, Colin appraises a 1969 Dodge Coronet Super Bee that is an all-original California-built car. Packaged with a 383ci V8 and a factory N96 air grabber hood, Colin thinks this to be an attractive car based on its unique color combo of high-impact F6 metallic green and black interior. But, original cars do come with flaws and Colin found a few in the rear end of the car.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: 90,000sqft or six barns full of dusty, rusty, forgotten treasures from decades of collecting. To name a few, GTOs, Caprices, Firebirds, Blazers, Suburban, Trucks, Jeeps, Broncos, and some pre-war cars. Everything is for sale and everything must go. Message email above, serious inquiries only.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom Cotter gets an exclusive and in-depth tour of the Detroit Historical Society's backroom collection, showcasing priceless Detroit icons. programme.title: Junk Raiders
programme.desc: There are just four days left to go in the build and the team has only $91.57 left out of their original budget of 5 grand left to spend on the stuff they can't find for free. But with a ton still left to do and find, Geoff has no choice but to once again try and hit up the client, Ron Smith, for some more cash. But the plan quickly runs into a major roadblock when Ron Smith refuses to return Geoff's calls. This is a big problem because with the long list of stuff that they still need in order to finish off the loft, it's looking like there's a very real possibility that the project may not get finished. And looming over everything is that Ron's coming back at the end to make his final decision: Will the build be good enough to stay or will it all get sent back to landfill.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Dig into a so-called total kitchen reno that turns out to be only skin deep.

programme.title: Holmes On Homes
programme.desc: Nancie and Woody moved into a 25-year-old townhouse that required some updating- particularly the floors and the "tiny" kitchen space. As renovations got underway, Woody was unexpectedly hospitalized. The contractors were left virtually unsupervised while Nancie tried to manage her job, visit Woody and take care of their daughter. All of the contractors were very sympathetic to her stating, "don't worry about the renovations- you are in good hands." What they left behind was simply one big mistake- one that Mike and the team will correct, with the help of a Country singing guest star.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Chris and Ihor had recently moved back to Canada after living in Texas for the last 20 years. After looking at 6 homes, they decided on one that was in a good neighborhood and hired a Home Inspector to insure that the home that was in good condition. They received a 25-page report from the home inspector, which concluded that there were only minor items that required addressing- The report also stated that the inspector will only report on surface conditions- for all major home systems such as plumbing and electrical, they defer to hiring "a qualified contractor to conduct the inspection". On moving day, some of the deficiencies became obvious as soon as they tried using the shower and fixtures in the basement. The pungent smell of sewage wafted through the home. It was the first in a series of creepy crawly, smelly and dangerous discoveries. For Chris and Ihor, and for the thousands of Canadians who have been caught in the same trap, it will take the frankness of Mike Holmes to uncover the myth that is "the Home inspection", and help this family get what they thought they had already paid for.

programme.title: Holmes On Homes
programme.desc: Lisa and Simon were preparing to have their first baby and needed to build a nursery and a bathroom. They found a reputable contractor at a home show with impressive credentials and long list of references. A contract was drafted, a substantial down payment was paid, and the 6-week job would be starting almost immediately. Over the next four months, every excuse was given why they could not start the job. With the realization that they may not have a properly functioning full bathroom, and a new born due in three months- Lisa and Simon fired the contractor- and called Mike Holmes. Time is ticking, with a baby on the way, and a bathroom and nursery that will need to be built again. Mike and the team race to beat the Stork!

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Navigate a bad bathroom reno that two Mike Holmes junkies thought they'd nailed.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Steinhatchee, Florida, with seafood-rich grilling of the Gulf Coast. Blackened redfish that we'll prepare “on the half shell”, to the Florida shrimp boil, deconstructed and flame-charred on the grill. And, yes, there will be oysters and clams—invigorated by the sweet scent of wood smoke. Explore one of the most colorful coastal regions in North America.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Today, we're grilling green with vegetables we love like asparagus, corn, and mushrooms. Celebrate meatless grilling in all its verdant glory. From a new egg salad with grilled fresh hearts of palm, to a squash, black bean, and queso fresco pizza you grill directly over the fire. And grilled cheese with portobello mushrooms served in a swirl of blazing cognac.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: How about upping your grill game with steaks you may not be familiar with, such as secreto or spinalis dorsi? Secreto is a hyper-flavorful steak cut from a hog's belly with a grilled vegetable sauce, romesco. Spinalis dorsi the most delectable part of a rib roast reborn as a steak, and grilled with bourbon. And grill a brisket steak fragrant with sizzling shallot sage butter.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Looking back to when our ancestors grilled in the fireplace, on stones around the campfire and directly on the embers, Primal Grilling will make you a barbecue rock star. Try ember-grilled bread roasted vegetable salad, chicken hanging in midair over a smoky fire, and amaretti-stuffed pears grilled on primordial slabs of salt, grilling techniques as old as humankind itself.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: In today's show, Texas barbecue meets Mexican spice as we explore how American barbecue techniques can enhance three classic Mexican dishes: snapper in pipian in a grilled vegetable and pumpkin seed sauce, pork shoulder pibil smoke-roasted in banana leaves, and a Project Fire first, a dessert quesadilla lavished with bananas and dulce de leche.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.sub-title: The Best BBQ You've Never Heard Of
programme.desc: Most barbecue enthusiasts can name the big three of barbecue: Kansas City ribs, Carolina pulled pork, and Texas smoked brisket. But what about some of the lesser-known styles? Cornell chicken was created by a Cornell University poultry scientist and today served in upstate New York. Up in Anchorage, Alaska, we have sweet yet smokey barbecued salmon.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Everyone knows that a good barbecue makes the perfect prelude to the game. In this show, we explore how my home state of Florida reimagines three tailgate classics. Get ready for pork shooters stuffed with shrimp, cheese and sausage, wings blasted with fire water, and smoky hamburgers like you've never experienced. The secret? Lace them with chopped barbecued brisket.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: The pork shoulder, aka Boston butt, gives us Carolina pulled pork. The majestic beef shoulder (yes, there is such a cut) becomes a Texas barbecued beef clod. As for lamb shoulder, Moroccans cook it in a fire-heated underground clay oven to make their legendary mechoui. This show explores the richest, meatiest, most flavorful cut you find in the meat department: the shoulder.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Chino-Latino originated with Chinese laborers who immigrated to Cuba, Trinidad, and elsewhere in the Caribbean to work the plantations. They developed a unique mashup of Asian and West Indian cooking—the subject of today's show. Get ready for tangerine teriyaki chicken, butter rum grilled plantains, smoky baby back ribs with guava barbecue sauce, and Korean brisket tacos.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: In Miami, our food culture is firmly anchored in Latin America and the West Indies. Our Miami Spice menu begins with a Project Fire first: the grilled mojito cocktail. Next comes Florida lobster grilled with rum butter baste and mango salsa, then plate-burying island spice beef plate ribs. Our grand finale? Turkey adobo with garlicky mojo de ajo.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Steak. It offers an irrefutable argument for simplicity, but it can also be the perfect foil for all the rubs, marinades, butters, and sauces you can throw at it. It's easy to grill, but takes a lifetime to perfect. Let's take a look back on how steak has evolved through three iconic TV series: Primal Grill, Project Smoke, and Project Fire.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: We all know Martha Washington from her portraits as a dowdy grandmother, but did you know that there is new evidence she was a beautiful and passionate wife befitting her handsome George? And that Martha was the secret weapon that kept troop morale high during the hard winter encampment at Valley Forge? We prepare Martha's authentic Turkey Stew with Oysters and speak with expert Patricia Brady.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: As early as 1690, German settlers left Europe for religious freedom in the new world of North America. They settled in the Philadelphia area, and immediately started to contribute to the innovations and spirit of our new country. In this episode, Chef Walter Staib prepares ale-braised sausages and shows us how his German ancestors helped to make America great.

Plus, an all-new Drew's News where Drew and Ross Mathews serve the news sunny-side up.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Drew's Crew To The Rescue Hour

Celebrity Interior Designer Mikel Welch is surprising one deserving viewer who lost her home office in Hurricane Ida with a brand-new workspace. Then, hair stylist extraordinaire Chris Appleton helps one mother of three spruce up her look before heading back to the office. Plus, renowned dating coach Damona Hoffman is on-site to help one couple reignite their marriage after recently becoming empty nesters, and “Rebel Homemaker” co-author Pilar Valdes is whipping up a yummy and healthy dish to help curb those carb cravings.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Jaleel White, Cooking School with Anne Burrell, Drew's News
programme.desc: Actor Jaleel White stops by to chat about his “Ever After” podcast and plays a fun game of “Did I Do That?” with Drew. Plus, Chef Anne Burrell joins Drew to teach an easy and delicious recipe of Chicken Milanese with a corn and tomato salad to two viewers

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: “Queer Eye” Cast, “Scream” Star Melissa Barrera, Drew-Gooder Philadelphia Teacher
programme.desc: “Queer Eye” cast Antoni Porowski, Bobby Berk, Jonathan Van Ness and Tan France are onhand to help Drew get ready for her upcoming date with a former “Top Chef” star. Then, Drew continues the countdown to the newest “Scream” film with star Melissa Barrera. Plus, meet Drew-Gooder Carlos Aponte, a history teacher from Philadelphia who extends learning outside of the classroom by getting his students involved in their community.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Martha Stewart, Drew's News with Phil Rosenthal
programme.desc: Martha Stewart stops by to whip up brioche and apple bread pudding, dishes on her thirst traps, the one person she's desperate to meet and shares why she has decided to open-up her Bedford home and gardens in her new shows. "Everybody Loves Raymond" creator and star of "Somebody Feed Phil" Phil Rosenthal joins Drew and Ross Mathews for a special Drew's News: Food News edition.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Pop Quiz Week Kick-Off, Anderson Cooper, Drew Gooder Nurse
programme.desc: Drew kicks off Pop Quiz Week, where every day one in-studio audience member will play for a chance win time in a money booth filled with $10,000. Actor Anderson Cooper joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk to discuss the latest headlines and his new book, “Vanderbilt: The Rise and Fall of an American Dynasty.” Plus, meet Drew-Gooder Brooke Johns, an ER nurse who volunteers to braid patients' hair on her days off. Then, Drew is celebrating the upcoming NYC Marathon with marathoner and chef Dan Churchill who whips up a healthy fried rice dish.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Beauty Week, Casey Wilson, Drew's News: Ask A Desk-pert Beauty Edition
programme.desc: Beauty Week continues with Drew revealing 100 beauty tips and giving head-to-toe makeovers to deserving viewers all week long! Actress Casey Wilson joins Drew to share her favorite beauty tips and discuss her new show “The Shrink Next Door.” Plus, celebrity hairstylist Adir Abergel shares his sure-fire tips to get that perfect hairdo. It's Ask A Desk-pert: Beauty Edition, where Drew and Ross are tackling all of your beauty questions.

programme.title: Rachael
programme.sub-title: Rachael's Taking Us Inside Her Italian Villa!
programme.desc: Rachael's celebrating her favorite place on Earth – Italy – by taking us along on her journey to renovate her dream Italian villa! Plus – Chef Scott Conant's making spinach ricotta gnudi. And – Rachael's serving up her classic chicken cacciatore!

programme.title: Rachael
programme.sub-title: Meet Two New Yorkers Who Are Spreading Cheer to Shelter Pets and Answering Santa's Letters
programme.desc: Meet two New Yorkers who are spreading cheer to shelter pets! And – Dr. Will Li is sharing holiday superfoods for brain health. Then – a merry make-your-own takeout night!

programme.title: Rachael
programme.sub-title: Rachael's Cooking a Nutritious Mini Meatball and Chicken Soup
programme.desc: Rachael's cooking a nutritious mini meatball and chicken soup! And – the U.S. Secretary of Agriculture, Tom Vilsack is talking about food insecurity and school lunches. Then – salad night with a TikTok star! Plus – bestselling author Brad Meltzer!

programme.title: Rachael
programme.sub-title: We're Hanging With Anthony Michael Hall and He's Talking About His Scary Role Alongside Jamie Lee Curtis in "Halloween Kills"!
programme.desc: From Halloween Kills, Anthony Michael Hall is here! Plus – Designer John Gidding shows us how to build a better bathroom without breaking the bank. And – Rachael's crispy five-spice chicken!

programme.title: Rachael
programme.sub-title: We're Celebrating Dishes That Make Us Say "Why Didn't I Think of That?" With Our Friends Chef Curtis Stone, Jacques Pépin and Sara Moulton
programme.desc: We're celebrating dishes that make us say ‘Why didn't I think of that?' with our friends Chef Curtis Stone, Chef Jacques Pépin and Sara Moulton who are all cooking up recipes they wish they wrote! Plus – Rachael's own spaghetti alla puttanesca!

programme.title: Rachael
programme.sub-title: Hilarie Burton Morgan Is Telling Us About Running a Hundred-Acre Farm With Her Husband and Kids, and Her New True Crime Thriller
programme.desc: Hillarie Burton Morgan is talking about her new true crime thriller, It Couldn't Happen Here! Plus a mother and daughter pilot duo gets a makeover by Clinton Kelly. And Rachael's making over an Italian sweet tart and turning it savory!

programme.title: Rachael
programme.sub-title: Rachael's Kicking Off the Show With Portobello Phillys!
programme.desc: Rachael's kicking off the show with portabella phillys! Then – we're celebrating Gabrielle Bernstein's ninth book and she's sharing how to help beat anxiety. Plus – cook and author Anna Gass shares two secret generational recipes!
